column1: Implementation of IFRS S1 & S2 Sustainability Disclosure Standards
Guaranty Trust Bank Nigeria has initiated its implementation strategy for the International Sustainability
Standards Board (ISSB) International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) S1 and S2 sustainability
disclosure standards. We have conducted Technical Training with top-notch external consultants to equip
internal personnel from key business units responsible for sustainability reporting and members of senior
management responsible for the implementation of the new standards.
